sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
OK so level 1 solution was confirmed: b, N, Y, p.
Palette: N, p, b, Y (cols 18, 26, 34, 42)
Solution: b, N, Y, p
Permutation: 3, 1, 4, 2 (palette position → solution position)
This is a "swap adjacent pairs" permutation: (1,2)→(2,1) and (3,4)→(4,3), giving positions 3, 1, 4, 2.
Wait: palette positions 1,2,3,4 → solution positions 2,4,1,3
Or: solution position 1 gets palette position 3, solution position 2 gets palette position 1, etc.
So the mapping is: 1←3, 2←1, 3←4, 4←2
This is: swap(1,2) then swap(3,4) applied to positions: 3,1,4,2
Actually, let me think of it as: take the palette in pairs (N,p) and (b,Y), then swap within each pair to get (p,N) and (Y,b), then interleave or reorder...
No, the solution is b, N, Y, p.
If we split palette into two halves: [N, p] and [b, Y]
Then take second half first: [b, Y, N, p] → no
Take first element of second half, first element of first half, second element of second half, second element of first half: b, N, Y, p → YES!
So the pattern is: interleave second half with first half.
For 4 elements: [1,2,3,4] → [3,1,4,2]
For 7 elements with split 3+4: [1,2,3,4,5,6,7] → [4,1,5,2,6,3,7]
Or with split 4+3: [1,2,3,4,5,6,7] → [5,1,6,2,7,3,4]
Let me try the first one with the bottom palette:
Palette: R, p, N, O, M, b, Y (positions 1-7)
Split: first 3 = [R, p, N], last 4 = [O, M, b, Y]
Interleave (last4, first3): O, R, M, p, b, N, Y
Red (3): O, R, M
Green (4): p, b, N, Y
Let me try this!

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try interleaving: second half first element, first half first element, etc.
# Palette: R, p, N, O, M, b, Y
# Split: [R, p, N] and [O, M, b, Y]
# Interleave: O, R, M, p, b, N, Y
# Red (3): O, R, M | Green (4): p, b, N, Y
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 30},   # O
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 22, 'col': 22},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 9},    # R
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 22, 'col': 28},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 37},   # M
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 22, 'col': 40},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 16},   # p
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 22},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 44},   # b
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 28},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 23},   # N
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 34},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 51},   # Y
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 40},
    {'action': 'SPACE'},
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
